message:
fix: replace hand-rolled YAML parser with yaml.Unmarshal in multirepo.go (bd-7fsv)

The manual YAML parser in readTypesFromYAML could not handle multi-line
YAML arrays, nested indentation, or YAML anchors/aliases. Replace it
with proper yaml.Unmarshal using a typed struct, consistent with how
database.go already parses YAML in the same package. Add test coverage
for readTypesFromYAML covering flow sequences, block sequences, empty
lists, missing sections, and missing files.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
